However,thereal-timeacquisitionofpreciseorbitandclockproductsoncelimited
the high-precision real-time application of PPP technology. To support high-precision
real-timeapplications,theInternationalGNSSService(IGS)formedtheReal-TimeWorking
Group (RTWG) in 2001. In August 2011,
